chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.2100 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge For hearing of bail application 14.01.2025. Ms. Rahat Ahsan, Addl. P.G. Mr. Jameel, advocate for complainant. = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant Nasir Ali is seeking pre arrest bail in Crime No.375/2024 U/s 376 PPC of P.S. Korangi, Karachi. Applicant is present on interim pre arrest bail and matter is fixed for confirmation or otherwise. 2. As per brief facts, complainant is ex-wife of applicant and has alleged in FIR that on 13.06.2024 applicant dropped her in her parents’ house and stated that he had already divorced her on 30.08.2023. The accusation is that from 31.08.2023 to 13.06.2024 despite divorce applicant kept complainant in his house and committed intercourse with her which is an offence u/s 376 PPC, hence FIR. 3. Applicant’s counsel is absent as usual and he submits that he has been falsely implicated in this case. 4. Learned counsel for complainant has prayed for dismissal of bail application whereas learned APG submits that this is a case of further inquiry. 5. I have considered submissions of the parties. The essence of the case is that applicant under the impression and posing himself as husband of complainant kept her in his house and allegedly committed zina with her. Applicant is denying this fact and submits that after divorce he did not sleep with complainant. The story as narrated in FIR requires further inquiry and it is yet to be determined through evidence whether such allegations could stand the trial or not. Complainant is ex- wife of applicant and has been divorced by him, therefore, hot feeling on her part and as a result, false implication of applicant by her cannot be ruled out. 6.

The story as narrated in FIR requires further inquiry and it is yet to be determined through evidence whether such allegations could stand the trial or not. Complainant is ex- wife of applicant and has been divorced by him, therefore, hot feeling on her part and as a result, false implication of applicant by her cannot be ruled out. 6. In view of above facts and circumstances, this application is allowed and the ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to the applicant is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The Cr. Bail Application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
